mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (user_id, task_id, runner_id, status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{taskId}, #{runnerId}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.runner_id AS runnerId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.runner_id AS runnerId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward, publisher.username AS publisherName, publisher.phone AS publisherPhone, runner.username AS runnerName, runner.phone AS runnerPhone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user publisher ON o.user_id = publisher.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.runner_id AS runnerId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward, publisher.username AS publisherName, publisher.phone AS publisherPhone, runner.username AS runnerName, runner.phone AS runnerPhone FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id LEFT JOIN user publisher ON o.user_id = publisher.id LEFT JOIN user runner ON o.runner_id = runner.id WHERE o.create_time >= #{startTime} AND o.create_time < #{endTime} ORDER BY o.create_time ASC

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id WHERE o.status = 0 ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.runner_id AS runnerId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.id, o.user_id AS userId, o.task_id AS taskId, o.runner_id AS runnerId, o.user_id AS publisherId, o.status, o.create_time AS createTime, t.title, t.description, t.reward FROM orders o LEFT JOIN task t ON o.task_id = t.id WHERE o.runner_id = #{runnerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
